---
page-layout: full
toc: false
code-tools: false
listing:
  id: notebooks
  contents: "**/*.ipynb"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories, reading-time]
---

> An **engram** is the physical trace a memory leaves in the brain — so this is where I store what I learn.

---

::: {#notebooks}
:::
